model.task: Predict Steam recommended / not recommended labels from multilingual review text

errors.text: its fun but 70€ and boring story/filler most of the time. Its fun with friends though

说实在的，现在优化上的问题我觉得已经是好多了，我个人游玩下来也完全没有卡顿或者闪退的情况。动作设计来看可以说是保持着合格的水准，饱受诟病的游戏内容过少的问题也有一定程度上的缓解。但我还是想说，灾难性的首发表现仅仅依靠这种程度的补救措施是不可能挽救差评的，哪怕出dlc想必最好的情况也只会是体量等同冰原，且定价和冰原首发持平，仍然不能把崩塌的口碑重建。作为从小学时代玩到成为社畜的怪猎玩家，即使我基本认可目前的体验，荒野也注定是一作失败的怪物猎人。
不好玩

I'm usually hesitant to pick up FPSs these days because i'm not into pvp, ammo starvation, jingoism (especially american jingoism), or games where the enemies are not humans.

But this one is none of those things.

And i cannot sing the praises of Night City enough. It feels like a real city, populated by real people.

It really makes you feel like you're en

Having extensively played Cities Skylines 1, I was quite excited to finally get into the 2nd release of this game. I do remember quite some mechanics from the previous version but in my first 5 games I have been unable to find any way of building an income stream or any type of production flow. Every city ends up losing heavily against high service costs of

Cities: Skylines 2 is a very fun and highly replayable city-building simulator. Thanks to a great variety of mods and frequent updates, the gameplay always feels fresh and there is always a reason to come back. Sadly, as with all games from this publisher, most of the new update content is hidden behind paid DLCs. Even if they are pretty cheap on their own,
G
